name: Outlook (Read-only)
description: Read-only Outlook Mail + Calendar tools via Microsoft Graph. Includes a login CLI (`openclaw outlook login`).

tenant.description: Tenant for auth (common|organizations|consumers or a tenant id).

allowUpns.description: Optional allowlist of userPrincipalName (email) values that can be used.

allowCalendarWrite.description: When enabled, allows creating calendar events (email stays read-only). Requires re-login for new OAuth scopes.
